title: Network Security, Attacks, Segmentation, and Hardening · Network Stakeholder Mission
summary: A community center serving staff, learners, guests, and managed devices. Users need reliable wireless access with appropriate identity, isolation, coverage, capacity, and support evidence. Planned artifact: Deliver Secure Community Center Wireless Deployment with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose channel, width, reuse, and band steering from regulatory domain, overlap, contention, capacity, and coverage.
Choose WPA2 or WPA3 and PSK or enterprise authentication with migration, certificate, credential, and client constraints.
Perform predictive and measured surveys and verify RSSI, SNR, interference, utilization, roaming, and application outcomes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
